question: What three things do you need to know to decide which placards (if any) you need?
canonical_answer:
1. Material's hazard class
2. Amount of each hazardous material on shipment
3. Total combined weight of all hazardous materials on shipment

appears_in.title: Arkansas Hazmat Test
appears_in.answer: Materials hazard class, amount being shipped, amount of all hazardous material on your truck.
